name: Electric Magnet
shop_ui_alignment: Shop UI V.9 — patch slices V6.1–V6.8 dokumenterer shop-linjer baglæns (shop_slot 8→1).
description: Specials og tech tree. Electric Magnet tech integration. Under V6.1–V6.8: shop-katalogsøjler knyttet til specials og monetization.
agent_prompt: Electric Magnet specials: run_verification, run_dna_test, view_star_map. Shop: shop_rulebook_patches V6.1–V6.8 (kategori↔docs). Wave v6/v7 shop-temaer ændrer ikke specials — fuld SKU-routing: rulebook_v9_shop.json cross_rulebook_routing.
tech_spec: Specials: run_verification, run_dna_test, view_star_map; agent_electric_magnet; skillsets.json; electric_magnet_tech
user_guide: Electric Magnet specials: verification, DNA test, stjernemap. Tilgængelige i Hunters game.
manual: Agent manual V6: Agents with specials use these three. Expose via execute or view_star_map.

rules.name: Electric Magnet Specials
rules.text: Tre specials deles mellem Electric Magnet, Hunters game og agent skillsets.

rules.name: Tech Tree
rules.text: electric_magnet_tech inkluderer view_star_map og star_map path.

rules.name: Agent Integration
rules.text: Agents med specials bruger samme liste. Debugger og profile viser dem konsistent.

rules.name: MN2 5-dags monitor
rules.text: Shop-linjen mn2_5d refererer til Profile MN2 5-dags UTC chart (ind/ud). Køb er tokens/flair — wallet-logik følger stadig MN2 API og brugerens faktiske balance.

rules.name: Tema-wave v6
rules.text: Wave v6-temaer (D&D, MTG tribute, Mafia, AI Core, Christmas, Home Base) er additive kosmetik; Electric Magnet specials forbliver uændrede i scope.

rules.name: Tema-wave v7 (måneder)
rules.text: Tolv theme-january … theme-december er kosmetik under themes-kategorien (V6.1). Ingen binding til run_verification/run_dna_test/view_star_map medmindre produkt kobler det eksplicit — se rulebook_v9_shop monthly_theme_catalog.

rules.name: mn2_5d vs specials
rules.text: mn2-5d-* SKUer (tech/cosmetic/boost/inventory) er Profile wallet-monitor flair (V1/V7/V9); de udvider ikke electric_magnet_tech eller specials-listen.

shop_rulebook_patches.summary: Inventory & orders tab + Profile inventory: merged API + Shop V.9 local shadow (shop_v9_shadow_*; migrates legacy shop_v4_shadow_*).
Stories SKUs (Winter Wedding m.fl.): narrative unlocks; purchases append shop purchase history.
Hunters trophies: cosmetic/progression lines; same unified user_id som resten af platformen.
Premium / unified-points bundles: caps enforced server-side; surfaced on Profile.
PayPal & coins tab: coin packs via /api/shop/coin-packs og PayPal capture flow.
Star Map 25 category: aligns med view_star_map special og V4 stjernedata.
Boosters & events tab + boosts filter: XP/timer boosters skrevet via unified points service ved køb.
Themes catalog: primary cosmetic/gameplay skins; køb via /api/shop-v3/purchase eller legacy /api/game/shop/purchase.
